top_signals.title: Europe’s Hunt for AI Stocks Leads to Power Suppliers and Banks
top_signals.summary: Investors who want additional exposure to artificial intelligence in Europe are getting creative, searching out companies that enable the technology or stand to benefit from it as the usual suspects get more pricey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
